top_signals.title: IBM shares plunge 25% as customers shift spending to AI
top_signals.summary: Chief executive Arvind Krishna says company ‘faltered’ as clients raced to buy servers and storage
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tom Kerridge: No good restaurant has ever been run by accountants
top_signals.summary: No good restaurant or pub has ever been run by accountants, celebrity chef Tom Kerridge told City AM as he pushes for a VAT cut for hospitality firms.  The TV personality and restaurateur has spearheaded lobbying efforts for the government to slash VAT for hospitality companies, a move which he says would offer the struggling [...]
